title: ai-badger plugins list
description: The single plugins.json for a <stack>/plugins/ directory: the full list of external Claude Code plugins that stack curates. Each references a marketplace declared in the sibling marketplaces.json by name.

marketplace.description: Name of a marketplace in the sibling marketplaces.json.

scope.description: default = inherit the scope chosen at init; local = project scope; user = user scope.
